NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on this day, 15th October 2023, by and between Dr. Tan Wei Ming, NRIC: S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238567, and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, NRIC: S3456789C, representing Innovatech Pte Ltd, UEN: 201912345T, with a registered office at 456 Raffles Place, Singapore 048621.

1. Confidential Information. For purposes of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall mean any data or information that is proprietary to either party and not generally known to the public, including, but not limited to, business plans, financial statements, client lists, and technical data. Any information disclosed to Dr. Tan Wei Ming by Innovatech Pte Ltd shall be considered confidential regardless of the form in which it is communicated.

2. Obligations of Receiving Party. The receiving party, Ms. Siti Aishah, agrees to maintain all received confidential information in strict confidence and shall not disclose any such information to third parties without prior written consent from the disclosing party, Dr. Tan Wei Ming. The receiving party agrees to use the confidential information solely for the purpose of evaluating a potential business collaboration.

For any inquiries, please contact Innovatech Pte Ltd at +65 6123 4567 or via email at contact@innovatech.sg.
